review_title: A content optimization tool with good potential
author: Nilayan G.
pros: SimilarContent is a handy tool that can help you optimize your article for better ranking on search engines. There are a number of similar tools in the market, and while SimilarContent is not the best, it does stand out on a few aspects. Let's look at a few things that I like about this tool. 1. The target keyword can be analyzed for any geography. 2. The tool gives you a list of words you should include in your article for better optimization. 3. The TF-IDF score is super useful to figure out how relevant is your text to the keyword. 4. The ability to share the project link with a team member without the need to create a new account is very useful.
cons: 1. SimilarContent does not give in-depth metrics such as keyword volumes and difficulty. 2. It does not receive regular feature updates. 3. The user interface looks dated.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: It's awsome , Now I am started to implemeting the advice given by the similar content. They are coming with new features topic generation . It is good sign for the new bloggers who struggle to create a good content.
author: Renuka R.
pros: The services are unique, for a new blogger difficult to find SEO works, but similar content solved this problem by providing the services in a lesser amount compared to Hubspot etc..
cons: The trail version should be increased to more than 15 days. now it is only for 7 days , the people can look after this , lot of people will purchase the tools .
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: A Good Range of Tools for Optimizing Content
description: Overall the software includes some important features like TF/IDF and works well as a basic content optimization tool.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: My favourite feature is the content optimizer, which gives a good overview of factors such as topic coverage, readability and the all important TF/IDF score. These help you to understand what subjects you need to include in your articles and make sure you don't over optimize.
cons: The rest of the toolset only covers the basics and needs further development.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: previously was much better, but still has some great functions
description: Previous "keyword" version worked much better and Ive received much better results. Currently, "topic centered" content optmimizer not gives similar results.
author: Rafal M.
pros: + still has some great functions like topic ideas generator or question analyzer + content rewriter inside (supports most of languages, but output quality is moderate) + keywords density tool (not sure will this still have any impact on SERP)
cons: - can't analyze websites behind CDN - it fires 403 code on webserver - no polish language support in most of tools - grabs all keywords without any filter (so you will get "cookie" and "gdpr" related keywords mostly) - current way of "topic centered" editor does not work properly (bad suggestions) in polish language

review_title: Excellent tools to optimize your content

pros: I love it, it's is easy to use and set up even for real novice people. I have used for several of my business websites and the advice/information that it provides really helped out our content writers and we saw a growth in the following months in traffic.
cons: Can't think of any cons at the moment...

review_title: Has the potential to be great, bumpy start hasn't helped build confidence
description: I really want to like this tool, it has potential and has helped me gain better ranks by updating content, but the bumpy start with the developer leaving and spamming the customer base, then the subsequent redesign not offering quite the same level of functionality has left me using alternatives
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Similarcontent has so much potential with the content optimizer to be a truly fantastic SEO tool
cons: Bumpy start with ex developer leaving, app redesigned and just not quite there yet

review_title: The Competition Wont Know what Hit them
description: All in all, we are able to make decisions much better when using similarContent. Not everyone is able to look at the content they have written to determine if it the right length or uses relevant terms. With SimilarContent you are able to do that and much more.
author: Donnie H.
pros: My content group really likes how SimilarContent looks hard for any and all relevant terms. This provides us with the information to make our articles much more competitive.
cons: I, along with my team, feel that having a grade really helps as well. Unfortunately, we did not care for the old searches that were displayed as they were limited.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
